title: SMB Group Insurance: Competitive Landscape & Prudential Position
description: Market analysis of U.S. SMB group insurance (~$110B), key players, Prudential Financial's competitive standing, and strategic implications.

title: SMB Group Insurance: Customer Experience Pain Points & Opportunities
description: Real customer complaints from Reddit and social media about group insurance carriers. What SMBs actually want and where every carrier is failing.

title: SMB Group Insurance: Solutions & Innovation Framework
description: 11 solution concepts for the SMB market — traditional approaches and creative/innovative ideas. Includes recommended deep dives.

title: STD/LTD Claims Volume & Trends for SMB Markets
description: Disability claims data: 616K STD and 75K LTD claims annually. Incidence rates, costs per claim, industry breakdowns, and what it means for SMBs.

title: Deep Dive: SMB Benefits Comparison Portal
description: Full business case — Kayak for group insurance. $320B TAM, 12.4x LTV:CAC, 16-week MVP for $325K. Recommendation: GO.

title: Deep Dive: Claims Concierge Service
description: Full business case — third-party claims advocacy. $4.5B TAM, tech+human hybrid model, break-even mid-Year 3. Recommendation: GO.

title: Deep Dive: Benefits Copilot (AI Advisor)
description: Full business case — AI-powered benefits consultant for SMBs. $18B TAM, $29-49/mo SaaS, 72% gross margin. Recommendation: GO.

title: Deep Dive: Benefits in a Box (Turnkey Stack)
description: Full business case — Shopify for Benefits targeting 2-25 employee companies. 5.4M addressable businesses, $18.2M ARR by Year 3. Recommendation: GO.

title: Deep Dive: ClaimTrack (Claims Tracker)
description: Full business case — Domino's pizza tracker for insurance claims. 75M annual claims, auto-escalation engine, $22M ARR by Year 3. Recommendation: Conditional GO.

title: AI in Software Testing — Lunch & Learn Guide
description: 8 use cases with case studies from Google, Meta, Microsoft, IBM, Accenture. Includes tools landscape, metrics, and discussion questions.

title: AI Testing with Claude — Practical Playbook
description: Step-by-step guide: exact prompts for using Claude in all 8 testing use cases. Copy-paste ready.

title: API Testing with Playwright — Complete Guide
description: Unified UI + API testing: CRUD operations, auth patterns, data-driven tests, CI/CD integration, and best practices. Includes comparison with Postman, SuperTest, REST Assured.
